item.title: SCENE 1: SoupDealer - Technical Analysis of a Stealth Java Loader Used in Phishing Campaigns Targeting Türkiye
item.description: SCENE 1: SoupDealer - Technical Analysis of a Stealth Java Loader Used in Phishing Campaigns Targeting Türkiye

item.description: Technical Analysis of Phishing Campaigns Targeting the Defense Industry Delivering Snake Keylogger

item.title: Introducing the Syscalls Feature in Threat.Zone: Unveiling Granular Malware Analysis
item.description: Introducing Syscalls: Gain deep insights into malware with Threat.Zone's new feature for advanced threat analysis!

item.title: Unveiling Perspectives: Advanced Malware Masterclass Workshops in Istanbul & Ankara
item.description: We hosted 2 Advanced Malware Masterclass Workshops in Istanbul & Ankara. Here is how they went.

item.title: Origins of A Logger - Agent Tesla
item.description: Recent research by Berk Albayrak and Utku Corbaci, the team members of Malwation Threat Research (MTR) team has focused on BEC attacks targeting the company's employees. You can find the white paper from their findings in this post.

item.title: Content Disarm and Reconstruction (CDR): Nice-to-Have or Must Have? What is the Cost of No Action?
item.description: What is CDR? Is it a nice-to-have or a must have? What are the risks of no actions? We gathered them all in this blog post!

item.title: Highlights from the 9th e-Safe Cybersecurity Summit
item.description: Here are the highlights of the 9th e-Safe Cybersecurity Summit from where we returned with an award for year's cybersecurity product, Threat.Zone-in Malware Detection/Analysis.
